---
name: "🚫 SAMPLE: Poorly-Formed Story (Pre-Dev BLOCK)"
about: Example of a story that BLOCKS Pre-Dev review — shows common mistakes
title: "[STORY] Make payments faster and better"
labels: story, pre-dev-test
---

## User Story
We need to improve the payment system so it's faster and more seamless for users.

## Acceptance Criteria

AC 1: Payment should work.
AC 2: It should be fast.
AC 3: Users should be able to pay easily.
AC 4: The system should handle errors.

## Notes
This is important. The payment team wants this done ASAP.

## Story Points: 13

<!--
INTENTIONAL PROBLEMS FOR AGENT TESTING:
  1. No "As a / I want / So that" format
  2. Description is vague — "faster", "better", "seamless", "easy" are untestable words
  3. ACs are not Gherkin and are completely unmeasurable
  4. No negative path ACs
  5. No BRD reference
  6. 13 story points — candidate for splitting (> 8 point threshold)
  7. No Definition of Done
  8. "ASAP" pressure language — no SLA defined
  The Pre-Dev agent review should return 🚫 BLOCK with specific remediation steps.
-->
